news_items.headline: Perez drives in 2 as the Royals beat the Phillies 5-2 to end a 4-game losing streak
news_items.summary: Perez sealed the game for the Royals with a two-run double in the eighth inning that scored Bobby Witt Jr. and Thomas.

news_items.headline: Red Sox ride homers by Duran and Contreras plus stout relief work to 7-5 win over Angels
news_items.summary: Boston’s eighth victory in 10 games completed a three-game sweep of the Angels, who have lost six straight and 12 of 19 since June 14.

news_items.headline: Red Sox Complete Sweep Of Angels Via The Long Ball

Padres snap their 8-game skid with 5-2 win over Dodgers on Manny Machado’s 3-run homer
news_items.summary: JP Sears threw five scoreless innings of one-hit ball as the Padres ended their longest skid since 2013 and avoided a four-game sweep.

news_items.headline: 'I wish she was alive.' Eliezer Alfonzo has emotional day as Dodgers lose to Padres
news_items.summary: Eliezer Alfonzo goes 0 for 2 in his major league debut, but there were more important things for the Dodgers catcher to think about.

news_items.headline: San Diego strikes back, Dodgers fail to secure sweep of Padres
news_items.summary: Dodgers couldn’t come back from down five runs, Padres snap seven-game losing streak winning 5-2.
